[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010101000 3
1 010001100 3
2 000000100 1
3 000100001 2
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 011010000 3

01 010000000 1

67 001101001 4
70 110011111 7
